events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **pass**, low risk. The pre-task documentation shows guarding, access control, and crew protection already staged per plan with a signed briefing and no visible active exposure or code violation, so there's no basis for a fail. I flagged follow-up verification items (110.26 working clearance, 200.4 conductor identification, LOTO/barricading) to confirm once active makeup work begins, since only pre-task setup was documented.
